entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: The primary legume crop targeted for genetic enhancement and hybrid development.

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The phenomenon of increased vigor and yield in hybrid offspring.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of the crop being enhanced.

entities.name: GENETIC MALE STERILITY-BASED HYBRID TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: A breeding approach using male sterility to produce hybrid seeds.

entities.name: SEED PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing seeds for large-scale agricultural use.

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC NUCLEAR MALE-STERILITY SYSTEM
entities.description: A biological system involving cytoplasmic and nuclear genes to induce male sterility.

entities.name: CAJANUS SCARABAEOIDES
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeon pea used as a source for male sterility.

entities.name: SHORT-DURATION PIGEON PEA CULTIVAR
entities.description: A specific variety of pigeon pea with a short growth cycle used in crossing.

entities.name: F1 AND BACKCROSS GENERATIONS
entities.description: The specific breeding generations used to evaluate the sterility system.

entities.name: FERTILITY RESTORATION SYSTEMS
entities.description: Mechanisms used to restore fertility to male-sterile lines for seed production.
